_value.title: Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) Stock Price, News, Quote & History - Yahoo Finance
_value.description: Marvell Technology (MRVL) is experiencing a significant rally, driven by strong quarterly earnings and notable endorsements from industry leaders like Nvidia's CEO.

_value.title: MRVL Stock Rockets As AI Demand And Jensen Hype Collide
_value.description: MRVL still shows low GAAP EPS due to stock‑based comp and acquisition costs, but the cash machine behind the scenes is what the street is paying for. The catalyst stack is thick.

_value.title: A $1 Trillion Reason to Buy Marvell Stock Now
_value.description: Nvidia (NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang just called it the next trillion-dollar company at Computex. That kind of remark gave the stock a powerful new catalyst and put fresh attention on its role in AI networking and connectivity.

_value.title: Why Marvell’s Stock Is Quietly Powering Higher - TipRanks.com
_value.description: The rally is being fueled by these company-specific catalysts, including the deepening partnership with Nvidia and a sharp upgrade to Marvell’s revenue outlook for fiscal 2027-2028.
